payload.text: buatkan website untuk mengidentifikasi produk unggulan desa di seluruh indonesia. Buatkan seperti formulir untuk dapat diisi oleh pihak eksternal yaitu dari daerah. Adapun data dan informasi yang dapat dideskripsikan adalah Kode Provinsi, Provinsi, Kode Kabupaten, Kabupaten, Kode Kecamatan, Kecamatan, Kode Desa, Desa, Lembaga Ekonomi Desa (Pilihan berupa BUM Desa, Koperasi, CV, PT, UD, Koperasi Desa Merah Putih, dan Lainnya), Alamat Lembaga Ekonomi Desa, Produk Unggulan Desa 1, Profil Produk Unggulan Desa 1 (Unggah Dokumen PDF), Produk Unggulan Desa 2, Profil Produk Unggulan Desa 2 (Unggah Dokumen PDF), Produk Unggulan Desa 3, Profil Produk Unggulan Desa 3 (Unggah Dokumen PDF), Produk Unggulan Desa 3, Profil Produk Unggulan Desa 3 (Unggah Dokumen PDF)

**Defining Project Scope**

I'm currently focused on defining the initial scope for this React SPA. The goal is an application for identifying Indonesian "Produk Unggulan Desa." A key aspect is the detailed form local authorities will use. I'm exploring the functionality needed for this.


**Detailing Form Elements**

I've been drilling down into the specific data fields for the form. I'm focusing on geography, economic institutions, and product details. Each product will have a name and profile upload. Validation requirements are also being considered. I'm aiming for a straightforward structure.


**Integrating AI Suggestions**

I'm now thinking about integrating Gemini to enhance product descriptions and suggest marketing slogans. The app's theme will be clean and professional, with Indonesian Red accents. I'm leaning toward a multi-step form, a stepper for a better user experience, and a mobile-first design using Tailwind. I'll utilize `useState` and `lucide-react` for the front end. I will use mock data for locations initially, focusing on Provinsi and Kabupaten.

entries.description: Application metadata specifying the name, description, and required permissions for the Desa Unggul platform.
Main HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and Font configuration.
React application entry point using React 18 createRoot API.
Shared TypeScript types and interfaces for the application.
Main application component containing layout, navigation, and state management for the multi-step form.

payload.text: Rubah Desa Unggul Republik Indonesia Menjadi Bangun Desa Bangun Indonesia. Sertakan logo kementerian Desa dan Pembangunan Daerah Tertinggal (https://id.wikipedia.org/wiki/Berkas:Kemendes_Logo_(2015).png)

**Updating Branding Elements**

I've got the DesaUnggul app branding updates in mind now. The primary task is straightforward: replacing "Desa Unggul Republik Indonesia" with "Bangun Desa Bangun Indonesia." Also, the new logo for the Ministry of Village and Development of Disadvantaged Regions needs to be integrated. The focus now is on how best to implement these changes efficiently.


**Locating the Image URL**

Okay, I've got a handle on the logo situation. The initial Wikipedia link wasn't a direct image source, so I'm investigating how to extract the proper URL. I'm looking at how to get that direct Kemendes logo image URL; usually I can find a working link to the image, and I think I've found it: `https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/e/ea/Kemendes_Logo_%282015%29.png`. And I know that I should be updating `components/Header.tsx` to reflect the new text.

payload.text: ganti pendataan digital 2024, tahunnya dihilangkan saja

**Identifying the Target**

I've pinpointed the relevant text. "Pendataan Digital 2024" resides within the `components/Hero.tsx` file, specifically inside a span element. My immediate task is to strategize the removal of "2024" without unintentionally altering anything else.


**Refining the Specification**

I've re-examined the initial directive and confirmed the focus: modifying "Pendataan Digital 2024" to "Pendataan Digital" within the `components/Hero.tsx` file. I've eliminated "2024" as a target for removal. After extensive code reviews, I've confirmed this is the only relevant occurrence. Now, I need to ensure the visual style remains consistent after I make the change. I'm ready to proceed with the specific code modification and have reviewed the relevant code.

**Refining the UI**

I'm currently focused on the `RegistrationForm.tsx` file. My goal is to swap out the text input field for "Provinsi" (Province) with a dropdown menu. The plan is to have the dropdown automatically populate the next field. I'm aiming for a more user-friendly experience during province selection.


**Implementing Province Selection**

I've got a constant ready for the province data, and double-checked the `FormState` in `types.ts` – all good there. Now, I'm diving into `RegistrationForm.tsx`. The goal is to swap that text input for "Provinsi" with a `<select>` dropdown. I'll include logic to update `kodeProvinsi` seamlessly as the user makes their selection. I'm using the provided ID and Name pairs for the dropdown options.

entries.description: Changed Provinsi input to a select dropdown and implemented automatic Kode Provinsi mapping based on the provided Indonesian provinces list.
